name: tdd-subagent
summary: Provides dispatch-tdd-subagent.py (per-feature TDD-cycle prompt assembler), tdd-step.py (forward-only TDD state machine, absorbed from the retired tdd-state-machine feature at v4.0.0), and the tdd-subagent agent definition. The rabbit-feature-touch orchestration skill is owned by rabbit-feature.
deprecation_criterion: When the TDD cycle is natively supported by the rabbit CLI.
spec_no_change_reason: spec changes committed in HEAD~2 (88ecfb43); test commit is HEAD
